# Why We’re Building Surface-Launched Barracuda-500

Earlier this year, we executed the first successful test of a prototype surface-launched Barracuda-500 at one of our test ranges, demonstrating the viability of Barracuda, the launcher, and booster for surface-launched CONOPs.
